title: Web app (Vite) over Tauri/Electron
rationale: Spec recommended Tauri (needs Rust) or Electron (heavy). A local-only file-reading tool needs none of it: File API + drag-drop to load, DOMParser to parse, Blob downloads + window.print() for export/PDF - all offline, no backend. Shipped as a Vite + React + TS + Tailwind v4 static bundle. Tauri/Electron is a thin wrapper around the same dist/ if a native window is ever wanted.

title: Multi-file tabs as source of truth; active=diff A, compare=diff B
rationale: Replaced single a/b file slots with a tabs[] array (id/name/raw/result). Active tab drives all analysis views; Diff picks B from other open tabs. Kept a/b/rawA/rawB/nameA/nameB as derived mirrors in the store (recomputed via mirror()) so existing components needed no prop changes. raw is stored for every tab; result is parsed lazily on activation (ensureParsed), matching the 'don't load all at once' requirement.
